start_date.description: UTC date and time in the format YYYY-MM-DDTHH:MM:SSZ. Any data generated before this date will not be replicated. If left blank, the start date will be set to 30 days before the present.
start_date.title: Start Date

scheduled_event_lookback_months.description: Number of months before the current date to include when fetching scheduled events. For example, 1 means events with start times up to 1 month in the past are included.
scheduled_event_lookback_months.title: Scheduled Event Lookback (Months)

scheduled_event_lookahead_months.description: Number of months after the current date to include when fetching scheduled events. For example, 6 means events with start times up to 6 months in the future are included.
scheduled_event_lookahead_months.title: Scheduled Event Lookahead (Months)

resourceConfigSchema.description: ResourceConfig is a common resource configuration shape.

interval.description: Interval between updates for this resource
interval.title: Interval

resourceConfigSchema.title: ResourceConfig
